business.type_label: business management software & IT automation vendor (ERP)
business.geography_hint: São José do Rio Preto, Brazil (pt-BR)

engine.ladder_reasoning: A 35-year firm selling its expertise to provide/customize business-management software; the page persuades via service categories, partner logos, Google reviews and FAQ rather than product feature proof (no screenshots/demos), so the visitor is deciding whether to trust the vendor.

goal.one_action: Message the company on WhatsApp to request a free demo / talk to a consultant

structure.archetype_note: Single-page WordPress site with #anchor nav (Serviços/Parcerias/Contato); no crawlable subpages exist. Área do Cliente is an external login portal, not a marketing page.

mapped.observed_as: Há mais de 35 anos agilizando a gestão da sua empresa...

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full; single-page structure, CTAs, proof and sections all captured verbatim.

gap_findings: 'Área do Cliente' is an external customer login portal (secondary audience/existing-customer flow) — sits outside the one-conversion-action model but is a common IT-vendor nav item; not expressible in current vocab, though not the site's conversion goal.
Google-reviews rating widget (aggregate star score + count) is proof beyond plain testimonials; captured as reviews proof-type but has no dedicated section id.
